name: NotificationFeed
description: NotificationHeader (title + Mark all as read + optional settings), NotificationTabMenu (generic underline tab bar with count badges, used for All/Inbox/Following/Archived), NotificationItem (avatar + title/timestamp/description row, 4 types: Basic/File/Button/Message, hover reveals a 'more' button), and NotificationFooter (keyboard-nav hint + Manage Notification link).
sourceNote: NotificationTabMenu generalizes Figma's fixed 'quantity' variants (02/03/04 hardcoded tab counts) into a data-driven `tabs` array, so any number of tabs works, not just 2-4. NotificationItem's optional company/brand icon before the description text is a generic `companyIcon` ReactNode slot (Figma's Apex logo asset was brand-specific).

tabs.type: { label: string, value: string, count?: number, dividerBefore?: boolean }[]

state.description: Forces the trailing 'more' button visible for design QA
